color: rgb(122, 62, 18) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DOS Reference Monitor:
allow / deny / transform / require-witness?

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
verdict from evidence
the agent didn't author

div.style: color: rgb(110, 31, 27) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Pre-flight ladder:
cheapest check refutes it?

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Dispatch:
pure/cached or fire for real?

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Tool vDSO answers LOCALLY
(never leaves binary, never re-invokes model)

div.style: color: rgb(94, 61, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Context admission gate (Context MMU):
does this result earn a place?

div.style: color: rgb(110, 31, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
QUARANTINE: summarize (headroom),
drop, or page to side store

div.style: color: rgb(58, 42, 102) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Side store
(model can fault back in)
